# Rollout plan

We could ramp the new pricing experiment to 50% of eligible cohorts
next week if the early read holds.

## Rollout schedule

Day 1: ramp the experiment to 50%.
Day 7: monitor guardrails.
Day 14: ship to 100% if no anomalies.

The plan above assumes the 50% ramp without an explicit decision marker.
